heading: Authority to require fiduciary to receive payments at regional offices of the Department when failing to provide required accounting
label: 5509 Authority to require fiduciary to receive payments at regional offices of the Department when failing to provide required accounting
notes: Effective DateSection effective on the first day of the seventh month beginning after , see , set out as an Effective Date of 2004 Amendment note under .Dec. 10, 2004section 507(a) of Pub. L. 108–454section 5312 of this title
amendments: Effective DateSection effective on the first day of the seventh month beginning after , see , set out as an Effective Date of 2004 Amendment note under .Dec. 10, 2004section 507(a) of Pub. L. 108–454section 5312 of this title

children.heading: .—Required Reports and Accountings
children.label: a .—Required Reports and Accountings
children.text: The Secretary may require a fiduciary to file a report or accounting pursuant to regulations prescribed by the Secretary.

children.heading: .—Actions Upon Failure To File
children.label: b .—Actions Upon Failure To File
children.text: In any case in which a fiduciary fails to submit a report or accounting required by the Secretary under subsection (a), the Secretary may, after furnishing notice to such fiduciary and the beneficiary entitled to such payment of benefits, require that such fiduciary appear in person at a regional office of the Department serving the area in which the beneficiary resides in order to receive such payments.
